textByHashes.d6d721655f1372a29d0358507ad9958fcb216e6f: Eyup. Not too often we get visitors down here.
textByHashes.b25d91daa410d7a29f1d747a441a5a2363c6159b: Beats me. All I know is, there's dust devils in here, and I'm here to make sure only people with permission can kill 'em.
textByHashes.cf111b79bb391602036f21ec15f25cb85a86ad2d: You got a Slayer task for it, so sure, be my guest.
textByHashes.115d7f36730656f6e0f77c8aad0a50ee7e81b690: Not without a Slayer task. Go talk to a Slayer Master about it.
textByHashes.b86d3ef4f832b03202a39ec74563b38af5892e3e: The name's Dusty Aliv. I guard this place for the Slayer Masters.
textByHashes.46cadc304814cc66e71c441d89863662eaa35e2d: Eh, it has its perks. Plus it beats flying around Gielinor after numbskulls like you trying to deliver mail like some people I know.
textByHashes.a721f12006258afc8fc9da41b298b53eb1a7cbcd: Thanks. Probably shouldn't tell you about the previous owner though.
textByHashes.b601c60648139df6566b96c463681b80fc537f85: Let's just say the heat got to them.
textByHashes.66120d0b30ad362004983f196e38992f28f62f0c: Oi! Only people with a Slayer task can slay in here!
